name: Beef with Assorted Vegetables- Szechuan
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Snow peas, or sliced beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a cleaver to slice beef across the grain and at an angle into thin strips; cut strips 2 inches long.
2. Combine marinade in a medium bowl; add beef strips and mix well. Let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Mix seasoning sauce in a small bowl.
4. Add salt and carrot to water in a small saucepan. Bring to boil, then add snow peas or green beans. Cook for 1 minute. Remove from heat and cool vegetables in cold water. Drain well. Slice carrot into thin slices.
5. Heat oil in wok over medium heat for 1 minute. Add marinated beef. Stir-fry until lightly browned. Remove with slotted spoon and drain over wok. Set aside.
6. Remove oil from wok, leaving 1/4 cup. Heat over high heat for 30 seconds. Add red peppers. Stir-fry for 15 seconds. Add mushrooms. Stir-fry for 3 minutes.
7. Add seasoning sauce, cooked snow peas, carrots, and cooked beef. Stir-fry until sauce thickens slightly. Serve hot.
